damage_scenario: Incorrect or stale measurements cause an unsafe or unavailable BMS decision.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Spoof, bias, replay, or suppress cell or pack data through a compromised CMU, bus node, diagnostic path, or gateway.
safety_impact: HIGH - Incorrect measurements may cause a wrong protection or control decision.
operational_impact: HIGH - Loss of trustworthy battery-state information may cause loss of function or degraded operation.
financial_impact: MEDIUM - Investigation, repair, warranty, or field-response costs may result.
privacy_impact: LOW - The scenario does not primarily expose personal information.
attack_feasibility_by_path: Diagnostic path MEDIUM; compromised gateway or bus node MEDIUM; physical CMU tampering LOW. Overall feasibility MEDIUM based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Reassess only after plausibility, source, freshness, and trusted-state protection tests pass.

damage_scenario: Unauthorized contactor, precharge, power-limit, or cooling action creates an unsafe operating transition.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Inject or replay a valid-looking command from a compromised ECU, service path, gateway, or remote controller.
safety_impact: HIGH - An unauthorized command may cause hazardous high-voltage energization, inrush current, or another unsafe transition.
operational_impact: HIGH - The command may interrupt operation, disable power control, or force an unavailable state.
financial_impact: MEDIUM - Investigation, component damage, repair, warranty, or field-response costs may result.
privacy_impact: LOW - The scenario does not primarily expose personal information.
attack_feasibility_by_path: Local bus injection MEDIUM; compromised service path MEDIUM; remote path through a gateway LOW. Overall feasibility MEDIUM based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Residual decision requires command-authorization, replay-protection, and operating-state-machine evidence.

damage_scenario: Unauthorized diagnostic access modifies software or configuration, clears faults, resets controllers, or disrupts operation.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Abuse diagnostic session changes, security access, routines, writes, resets, or programming through local or remote diagnostic access.
safety_impact: MEDIUM - Diagnostic abuse may create persistent misconfiguration or interfere with safety-relevant operation.
operational_impact: HIGH - Unauthorized programming, resets, fault clearing, or service-mode entry may cause major loss of function.
financial_impact: MEDIUM - Investigation, recovery, software restoration, warranty, or field-response costs may result.
privacy_impact: MEDIUM - Credentials, service identities, or diagnostic information may be exposed.
attack_feasibility_by_path: Local diagnostic access MEDIUM; remote diagnostic access LOW. Overall feasibility MEDIUM based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Residual decision requires session-control, security-unlock, service-authorization, programming-sequence, attempt-counter, and lockout evidence.

damage_scenario: Compromised, corrupted, or downgraded firmware causes persistent unsafe behavior or loss of service.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Supply an invalid signer, modified image, wrong target, vulnerable version, or interrupted package through an update path.
safety_impact: HIGH - Compromised software may disable protection or produce persistent unsafe behavior.
operational_impact: HIGH - Invalid or interrupted firmware may prevent startup or cause major loss of service.
financial_impact: HIGH - Recovery, field action, warranty, or product-impact costs may be severe.
privacy_impact: LOW - The scenario does not primarily expose personal information.
attack_feasibility_by_path: Forged or modified package without signing-key compromise LOW; interrupted-update abuse MEDIUM; stolen signing key LOW. Overall feasibility MEDIUM based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Residual decision requires authenticity, compatibility, anti-rollback, verify-to-execute, interruption, and recovery evidence.

damage_scenario: Unauthorized or incompatible calibration changes protection thresholds, scaling values, or the approved battery profile.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Use diagnostic or configuration access, or a signed-but-incompatible package, to alter approved parameters.
safety_impact: HIGH - Unsafe thresholds or scaling may cause incorrect protection behavior.
operational_impact: MEDIUM - Incompatible configuration may degrade operation or make the BMS unavailable.
financial_impact: MEDIUM - Investigation, recalibration, repair, warranty, or field-response costs may result.
privacy_impact: LOW - The scenario does not primarily expose personal information.
attack_feasibility_by_path: Diagnostic or configuration access MEDIUM; signed-but-incompatible package LOW. Overall feasibility MEDIUM based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Residual decision requires authorization, parameter-relationship, approved-hash, compatibility, and audit evidence.

damage_scenario: Critical communication is delayed, lost, malformed, or resource-starved, preventing trustworthy control.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Flood the virtual bus, omit periodic data, send malformed frames, exploit parser behavior, or exhaust bounded resources.
safety_impact: MEDIUM - Safety impact is limited by correctly implemented degraded or safe-state behavior.
operational_impact: HIGH - Communication loss, latency, flooding, or parser failure may cause major availability loss.
financial_impact: MEDIUM - Investigation, service interruption, recovery, or product-support costs may result.
privacy_impact: LOW - The scenario does not primarily expose personal information.
attack_feasibility_by_path: Bus-access flooding HIGH; remote resource pressure MEDIUM. Overall feasibility HIGH based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Residual decision requires timeout, rate, latency, bounded-resource, parser, and safe-state evidence.

damage_scenario: An unauthorized remote or site-network client changes BESS values, settings, or commands.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Use stolen or revoked credentials, an unexpected network zone, an invalid function or address, or downgraded session protections.
safety_impact: MEDIUM - Site interlocks may limit harm, but unauthorized control can still create unsafe operating conditions.
operational_impact: HIGH - Unauthorized remote control may cause site outage, loss of control, or degraded operation.
financial_impact: HIGH - Site outage, equipment impact, incident response, or recovery costs may be severe.
privacy_impact: LOW - The scenario does not primarily expose personal information.
attack_feasibility_by_path: On-site network client HIGH where segmentation is weak; remote access using credential weakness MEDIUM. Overall feasibility HIGH based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Applies only to the BESS extension. Residual decision requires authentication, authorization, role, network-zone, function, address-range, and rate-control evidence.

damage_scenario: Evidence is lost or altered, preventing detection, reproduction, remediation, retest, or accountable closure.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Cause event flooding, storage failure, checkpoint corruption, record tampering, or false-PASS handling.
safety_impact: LOW - Evidence compromise does not directly create the primary battery hazard in this lab model.
operational_impact: MEDIUM - Incident response, reproduction, remediation, and recovery may be impaired.
financial_impact: MEDIUM - Investigation may be prolonged and weaknesses may be closed without proof.
privacy_impact: LOW - The scenario does not primarily expose personal information.
attack_feasibility_by_path: Storage or application failure MEDIUM; privileged record tampering LOW. Overall feasibility MEDIUM based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Residual decision requires bounded logging, complete records, checkpoint integrity, tamper-evident history, remediation, and passing-retest evidence.

damage_scenario: Debug or bootloader access extracts firmware or keys, or implants a persistent modification.
threat_scenario_and_attack_paths: Use exposed JTAG or SWD, an unlocked bootloader, or a serial console during physical access or through a compromised service tool.
safety_impact: HIGH - Persistent compromise may bypass message-level controls and disable protection behavior.
operational_impact: HIGH - Debug or boot access may create persistent loss of control or service.
financial_impact: MEDIUM - Firmware, intellectual property, keys, investigation, repair, or field-response costs may result.
privacy_impact: MEDIUM - Extracted keys, credentials, or service information may expose protected information.
attack_feasibility_by_path: Field physical access LOW; service or bench context MEDIUM. Overall feasibility MEDIUM based on the highest-feasibility credible path.
residual_risk_gate: Policy-model coverage only in this lab. Residual decision requires evidence that unauthorized debug, bootloader, and console access is rejected and logged, while authorized lifecycle access is audited.
